blended.narrative: Ski Butternut is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.6 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 3,614 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 44°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
